answer:
\boxed{A}, \boxed{B}, \boxed{C}, \boxed{E}, \boxed{F}, \boxed{G}  

Food balance sheets have several limitations: they do not guarantee accurate production data, fail to account for climate change impacts, often miss processed and home-grown foods, do not reflect actual nutritional status, and provide only aggregate, not real-time, data. Therefore, all options except D are correct limitations.
